name: Tomica Heroes Job Labor Special Combined Robot
original_name: トミカヒーローズ ジョブレイバー 特装合体ロボ
overview: A Web Anime based on Takara Tomy's Tomica Heroes Toy Cars toyline of the same name. The anime will feature "Braver" units, which combine job-related robots called "Jobroids" with "Armor Tomica" automobiles related to police, fire fighters, emergency medical personnel, trash collecting, and construction.

trailers.title: 【トミカ】トミカヒーローズ ジョブレイバー 特装合体ロボ ティザームービー
